Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AccountCreation
    Displays the account creation screen for the ABBG Board Games application.
    Admin
     
    BrowserPanel
    Abstract base panel for browsing either games or collections.
    CollectionBrowserPanel
    A browser panel used to display and manage a user's game collections.
    CollectionBrowserPanel.CollectionCardListener
    Listener interface used to handle when a collection card is clicked.
    CollectionDialog
    A dialog window used for managing a user's game collections.
    FileScannerXML
    Parses a board game XML file and converts its contents into Game objects.
    Game
    Represents a board game with its core attributes.
    GameBrowserPanel
    A browser panel implementation for displaying the full game database.
    GameBrowserPanel.GameCardListener
     
    GameCard
     
    GameDatabase
    Represents a database of board games that provides access to and operations on a collection of Game objects.
    GameDescriptionPanel
    GameDescriptionPanel displays information about a selected board game.
    GUIColors
     
    LoginScreen
    Displays the login screen for the ABBG Board Games application.
    Main
     
    MainFrame
    MainFrame controls navigation between the major screens.
    ManageUsersPanel
     
    Review
     
    RoundedButton
     
    RoundedPanel
     
    SidePanel
     
    User
    Represents a user and its core attributes.
    UserCollection
    model.UserCollection inherits data.GameDatabase This class will have methods that add, remove, and shows that it contains the users games
    UserDatabase
     
    UserSettingsPanel
